source_jobs.title: Head of Information Security
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.


THE ROLE

Own and scale the data security, compliance, and AI governance program for Humanly, an HR tech platform entrusted with sensitive employee, candidate, and workforce data. This role sets strategy and drives execution to protect the company and its customers, enable revenue, ensure responsible AI development, and keep us ahead of a fast-moving regulatory landscape. Reports to the Chief Technical Strategist.




WHAT YOU’LL OWN


SECURITY & COMPLIANCE

 - Establish, maintain, and continuously improve the policies, procedures, and controls that protect the company and drive adoption across every function. Own the certification and audit roadmap and partner with engineering on secure SDLC, vulnerability management, and access governance.

 - Design and run the security awareness program - onboarding, annual training, phishing simulations, and role-based training for engineers and high-risk functions - and foster a culture where security, privacy, and responsible AI are shared responsibilities rather than blockers.

 - Own the security incident response plan and lead detection, containment, investigation, breach notification decisions, and post-incident review in partnership with legal.

 - Maintain and regularly test business continuity and disaster recovery plans.


PRIVACY & DATA PROTECTION

 - Own the privacy program across GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and the evolving patchwork of US state and international privacy laws, including data subject rights workflows, DPAs, and sub-processor disclosures.

 - Partner closely with legal counsel, and serve as DPO where required.


AI GOVERNANCE

 - Build and operate the AI governance framework - model inventory, risk classification, review and approval, bias and fairness testing, and ongoing monitoring - for both customer-facing AI features and internal employee use of AI tools.

 - Drive compliance with AI-specific regulations affecting HR tech.


RISK MANAGEMENT

 - Maintain an enterprise risk register covering security, AI, privacy, and third-party risk, and drive periodic assessments and remediation.

 - Lead vendor and third-party risk management and evaluate cyber insurance coverage in partnership with finance and legal.


CUSTOMER & REVENUE ENABLEMENT

 - Own the security and trust narrative for prospects and customers, leading responses to RFIs, RFPs, and security questionnaires alongside GTM, and supporting Customer Success on customer security inquiries and assurance activities.

 - Maintain a customer-facing trust center with current certifications, sub-processors, policies, and security documentation.




WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 5+ years in information security

 - You've owned a compliance program end-to-end and not just contributed to one. You know what it takes to get to SOC 2, and what comes after

source_jobs.title: Manager of Revenue Operations & Systems
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.


THE ROLE

Humanly has grown fast – through product expansion, multiple acquisitions (Qualifi, Sprockets, Anthill, Teamable), and an increasingly complex go-to-market motion. The revenue org now spans Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Partnerships, each running on a patchwork of systems, processes, and data inherited from those growth phases.

The infrastructure is largely in place. What's missing is someone who can take ownership of it – optimizing what exists, eliminating the debt that's accumulated, and building the operational foundation that lets every revenue team move faster and with more confidence.

That's this role.

As the Head of Revenue Operations & Systems, you'll own the full revenue systems ecosystem end-to-end: HubSpot architecture, data integrity, forecasting infrastructure, GTM tooling, deal desk, and cross-functional operational alignment. You're not a support function – you're the person Sales, CS, Marketing, and Partnerships come to when the systems, data, or rules of engagement aren't working. You'll also serve as the neutral tiebreaker on ROE disputes across revenue teams.

This is an individual contributor role. There's no team to inherit and no playbook to follow – you'll write both. You'll report directly to the VP of Sales and have a direct line to leadership across every GTM function.




WHAT YOU'LL DO


REVENUE SYSTEMS ARCHITECTURE & OPTIMIZATION

 - Own the performance, scalability, and operational health of the full revenue systems ecosystem

 - Govern HubSpot architecture – account/contact/opportunity structure, lifecycle stages, territory logic, routing, and attribution

 - Own and optimize the full GTM tooling stack (HubSpot, Gong, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, ZoomInfo, and adjacent tools) – configuration, adoption, vendor relationships

 - Eliminate redundancy and technical debt across integrated platforms; consolidate and rationalize where needed


DATA INTEGRITY & REVENUE TRUST

 - Own CRM data quality standards, deduplication, account hierarchy, and source-of-truth definitions across all integrated platforms

 - Lead active cleanup of inherited workflows, duplicate records, broken automations, and inconsistent data structures from acquisition activity

 - Ensure that Sales, CS, Finance, and Partnerships leadership can make decisions from a single, reliable data environment – and hold yourself accountable for measurably improving it over time


FORECASTING & REVENUE INTELLIGENCE

 - Mature the forecasting and reporting infrastructure from functional to predictive

 - Deliver leadership-ready visibility into pipeline health, conversion performance, rep productivity, expansion opportunities, and customer lifecycle movement

 - Own the KPI framework across GTM functions – define it, maintain it, and drive adoptio

source_jobs.title: Head of People
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.


THE ROLE

Humanly is entering a new growth phase. The foundation is in place and the work ahead is to decide what scales, what gets reinvented, and what we build next as we grow from 50 to 100+.

As Head of People, you'll partner directly with the CEO and the executive team on the decisions that shape everyone here — how we hire, how people grow, and how we show up for each other as we scale. The systems and culture you build upon will be felt by every Human Bean.

This is a hands-on role. You'll be in the weeds and at the leadership table on the same day, and the right person finds energy in both. You won't have a People team behind you from day one — you'll use AI to handle the load that doesn't need a human touch, so your time goes to the work that does.

The Head of People role is in-person at our Bellevue, WA office, four days a week. We build better together.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN


EXECUTIVE PARTNERSHIP & PEOPLE STRATEGY

 - Be a thought partner to the CEO and leadership team on the people calls that matter at this stage

 - Translate company strategy and growth plans into a clear People roadmap

 - Partner on organizational design, headcount planning, leveling, and talent decisions


TALENT ACQUISITION

 - Own the TA function — own the strategy and call whether to scale through vendors, in-house, or a hybrid model

 - Implement competency frameworks, scorecards, and structured interview processes

 - Partner with leaders to forecast hiring needs and maintain exceptional talent quality

 - Make sure every hire raises the bar against Humanly's values and performance expectations


PERFORMANCE MANAGEMENT

 - Design and run our performance cycle — goal-setting, reviews, calibration, leveling, and career frameworks

 - Build manager enablement — training on feedback, performance, and hiring decisions

 - Coach managers through difficult conversations and bring judgment where the playbook doesn't apply


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - Lead compensation strategy — pay bands, equity practices, and total rewards as we scale and acquire

 - Conduct market benchmarking and make sure our comp philosophy holds up across functions and stages

 - Own benefits end-to-end; make sure what we offer matches the company we're becoming


CULTURE & ENGAGEMENT

 - Strengthen our Human Beans culture through systems, rituals, and expectations

 - Design company-wide engagement programs, off-sites, and recognition initiatives

 - Own engagement measurement and act on what the data tells us


PEOPLE OPERATIONS & HR INFRASTRUCTURE

 - Own HRIS, payroll, employee data, handbook, and policies; make build/buy/PEO calls on our people stack

 - Build an onboarding engine that gets new hires to velocity fast — structured 90-day plans by role, with clear milestones

 - Manage employ

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.


THE ROLE

We're looking for a Customer Success Manager to partner with recruiting leaders, talent acquisition teams, and hiring organizations as they transform their hiring processes using Humanly.

This role sits within our Customer Success team and owns a portfolio of mid-market customers. You'll act as a strategic advisor, helping customers achieve hiring outcomes, drive adoption, and maximize the value they receive from Humanly's solutions.

This is not just a Customer Success role. We are looking for someone who understands recruiting operations and can have meaningful conversations with recruiters, talent leaders, and executives about hiring challenges, workflow optimization, candidate experience, and business outcomes.

You'll work closely with our Product, Support, Implementation, and Growth teams while serving as the primary advocate for your customers. As Humanly continues to scale, you'll have the opportunity to help shape our customer success processes, best practices, and customer engagement strategy.




WHY ARE WE EXCITED ABOUT THIS ROLE?

Humanly is entering a new phase of growth, serving increasingly sophisticated recruiting organizations with complex hiring needs. Our customers expect more than software, they expect expertise, guidance, and partnership.

This role sits at the center of that mission.

The right person will help recruiting teams modernize how they hire, leverage AI responsibly, and achieve measurable recruiting outcomes. You'll directly influence customer retention, adoption, expansion, and product feedback while building trusted relationships with some of the most innovative talent acquisition teams in the market.




WHAT YOU'LL DO


CUSTOMER RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT

 - Own a portfolio of mid-market customer accounts and serve as their primary strategic contact.

 - Build trusted relationships with recruiters, recruiting leaders, operations teams, and executive stakeholders.

 - Lead regular customer meetings, business reviews, and strategic planning discussions.

 - Advocate for customer needs internally across Product, Support, Engineering, and Revenue teams.


ADOPTION & CUSTOMER OUTCOMES

 - Drive adoption and utilization of Humanly's products across customer organizations.

 - Help customers establish success metrics and achieve measurable business outcomes.

 - Monitor customer health and proactively identify risks, opportunities, and engagement trends.

 - Deliver training, enablement, and change management support to ensure long-term customer success.


STRATEGIC CONSULTING

 - Understand customer hiring workflows, recruiting challenges, and business objectives.

 - Analyze customer usage data and hiring performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities.

 - Prepare and deliver Quarterly Business Re

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.


THE ROLE

Humanly is seeking a high-performing Enterprise Account Executive (AE) to drive strategic growth across large enterprise organizations. This senior B2B sales role is focused on helping Fortune 1000 and high-volume employers modernize hiring through AI-powered recruiting automation, AI applicant engagement, and talent acquisition technology. The ideal candidate thrives in complex sales environments, understands enterprise HR ecosystems, and is passionate about transforming the candidate and recruiter experience.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Target Audience: Sell Humanly’s AI-powered recruiting platform to enterprise organizations with large-scale hiring needs, including brands such as Domino's Pizza, Massage Envy, MGM Resorts International, and Wayfair.

 - Enterprise Sales Execution: Navigate complex and consultative sales cycles involving multiple stakeholders across Human Resources, Talent Acquisition, Operations, IT, Security, Legal, and Procurement teams.

 - Value Proposition: Demonstrate how Humanly’s conversational AI platform streamlines recruiting operations through automated candidate engagement, interview scheduling, screening workflows, and recruiting intelligence that improves speed-to-hire and candidate experience.

 - Strategic Partnerships: Collaborate with executive buyers including CHROs, Talent Acquisition leaders, HR Operations teams, CIOs, and enterprise compliance stakeholders to align solutions with organizational hiring goals.

 - Technology Integrations: Position Humanly as a seamless pre-hire extension of enterprise HR technology ecosystems, integrating with leading HRIS, CRM, payroll, and workforce management platforms.

 - Pipeline Management: Build and manage a healthy enterprise pipeline through outbound prospecting, strategic account planning, referrals, events, partnerships, and executive networking.

 - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Product Managers, Customer Success, Marketing, and Implementation teams to ensure successful evaluations, pilots, onboarding, and long-term account growth.

 - Revenue Ownership: Consistently achieve and exceed quarterly and annual revenue targets while maintaining accurate forecasting and account management discipline.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 5+ years of enterprise SaaS sales experience, preferably in HR technology, AI, recruiting, workforce management, or automation platforms.

 - Proven success selling into Fortune 1000, enterprise-level, or Franchisor organizations with multi-stakeholder buying processes.

 - Experience managing and accelerating traditionally long sales cycles and complex procurement processes.

 - Strong understanding of talent acquisition workflows, enterprise hiring challenges, and HR technology ecosystems.

 - Exceptional communication, pr

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant & Office Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.


THE ROLE

Own the operating system behind the CEO. As Executive Assistant & Office Manager, you’ll provide executive support to the CEO while ensuring Humanly’s office runs as a high-functioning, organized, and energizing environment for the entire team. This role blends strategic EA support with hands-on office operations — enabling the CEO and leadership team to operate at their best while building a strong in-office culture.




WHAT YOU’LL OWN


CEO LEVERAGE

 - Own and optimize the CEO’s calendar, ensuring time is consistently spent on highest-impact priorities

 - Proactively manage scheduling, conflicts, and prioritization

 - Prepare the CEO for meetings with briefs, context, and follow-ups

 - Track action items and ensure follow-through

 - Manage inbound communications and act as gatekeeper when needed

 - Coordinate travel, logistics, and key events

 - Support preparation for board meetings, leadership meetings, and external engagements




EXECUTION & COORDINATION

 - Track and follow up on key initiatives and action items across the leadership team

 - Ensure meetings result in clear next steps and accountability

 - Help drive operational cadence (weekly leadership meetings, all-hands, etc.)

 - Assist in lightweight project management across teams

 - Reduce operational friction for the CEO and leadership team




INFORMATION HUB

 - Ensure smooth communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders

 - Organize and maintain key documents, notes, and internal resources

 - Capture and synthesize notes from key meetings

 - Help maintain visibility into priorities, deadlines, and commitments

 - Ensure nothing falls through the cracks




OFFICE MANAGEMENT & OPERATIONS

 - Own day-to-day office operations (supplies, vendors, facilities, etc.)

 - Ensure the office is organized, functional, and a great place to work

 - Manage office budget and vendor relationships

 - Coordinate in-office logistics (meals, events, onboarding setup)

 - Support the hybrid/in-office experience for employees

 - Handle ad hoc operational needs quickly and effectively




CULTURE & TEAM EXPERIENCE

 - Help create a positive, welcoming office environment

 - Support team events, offsites, and company gatherings

 - Assist with the onboarding experience for new hires

 - Be a connector across teams and help maintain strong internal relationships

 - Reinforce company culture through day-to-day interactions




WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 3+ years of executive assistant or chief of staff experience, ideally supporting a C-suite executive at a fast-paced startup

 - Mastery of calendar management, travel coordination, and executive communications — you can run a complex CEO schedule without losing a beat

 - Strong organizational and project coordinatio

source_jobs.title: Implementation Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.

As an Implementation Manager, you'll own the post-sale technical onboarding experience for Humanly's enterprise and mid-market clients. You'll be the person clients trust to get them live, translating complex workflows, integrations, and configurations into a smooth, confident launch. You're equal parts project manager, solutions consultant, and trusted advisor, and you thrive when clients say 'we didn't know implementation could feel this good.



What You'll Do

Client Onboarding & Launch

 - Own end-to-end implementation for a portfolio of new clients, from kickoff through go-live

 - Lead discovery sessions to understand each client's hiring workflows, ATS configuration, and integration requirements

 - Build and manage implementation project plans with clear milestones, dependencies, stakeholder accountability, and timelines

 - Configure Humanly's platform (AI Recruiter, AI Interviewer, Talent CRM, ATS integrations) to match client-specific workflows

 - Deliver training sessions for HR teams, recruiters, and hiring managers, making complex tools feel simple

Technical Integration & Configuration

 - Manage integration configurations between Humanly and client HR tech stacks, including ATS platforms, HRIS systems (UKG, ADP, Workday, etc.), and job boards, following pre-built steps or coordinating with engineering on new builds

 - Validate field mappings, data flows, and API-based connections

 - Identify and resolve configuration issues proactively, before they become client-facing problems

 - Collaborate with Humanly's engineering and product teams to flag technical gaps or escalate complex issues

Client Relationship & Project Management

 - Serve as the primary point of contact throughout implementation, staying responsive, organized, and proactive

 - Run structured working sessions and status updates that move things forward (not just report on them)

 - Manage multiple simultaneous implementations without letting any client feel deprioritized

 - Document configurations, decisions, and handoff notes clearly for the Customer Success team post-launch

 - Surface expansion and upsell signals to CS/AE partners during and after implementation



What We're Looking For

Required

 - 2–4 years of experience in SaaS implementation, solutions engineering, or technical customer success

 - Demonstrated ability to manage multiple client implementations simultaneously, end to end

 - Hands-on experience with HR tech integrations including ATS, HRIS, or HCM platforms (UKG, ADP, Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, iCIMS, or similar)

 - Strong project management skills with PMP or CAPM certification (or active pursuit). You track everything, follow up on everything, and nothing falls through the cracks

 - Excellent client communication: you can explain a com

source_jobs.title: Implementation Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HUMANLY

Humanly builds AI-native hiring software that turns recruiting from a reactive scramble into a predictable system. Built for hourly, frontline, and high-volume hiring, we don't just give teams tools — we deliver pre-vetted, ready-to-hire candidates on demand. Our AI conducts over 9,000 interviews a day for hundreds of customers, including Microsoft, Domino's, MGM Resorts, and Massage Envy.

We recently closed a $25M Series B, and we're using it to accelerate what's already working: expanding the platform, growing the team, and deepening our reach with the companies who rely on us. Headquartered in Bellevue, WA with a team that spans the globe, we're at the stage where the foundation is built, the momentum is real, and the ceiling is wherever we decide to put it.

We call ourselves Human Beans. We take ownership, move fast, and care about doing the right thing — for our customers, for candidates, and for each other. AI is core to what we build, and we're intentionally building a workplace where it's embedded in how we work too. We know the future is changing, and we're changing with it. If that's the kind of place where you do your best work, we'd love to meet you.

What You'll Do

As an Implementation Coordinator, you’ll support the post-sale onboarding experience for Humanly’s enterprise and mid-market customers. You’ll work alongside Implementation Managers to keep projects organized, on track, and moving toward go-live—owning the details that make implementations feel smooth and predictable. You’re a strong communicator, highly organized, and energized by helping customers and internal teams coordinate effectively.

Implementation Support & Coordination

 - Support end-to-end implementations from kickoff through go-live by coordinating tasks, timelines, and stakeholders

 - Schedule and help facilitate discovery sessions, working sessions, trainings, and status updates

 - Maintain implementation project plans, ensuring milestones, dependencies, and next steps are clearly documented

 - Track action items and follow-ups so nothing falls through the cracks

Platform Setup & Technical Coordination

 - Support the team by configuring Humanly’s platform (AI Recruiter, AI Interviewer, Talent CRM, ATS integrations) to match customer workflows, under guidance from Implementation Managers

 - Support integration setup activities (ATS/HRIS/job boards) by following documented steps, collecting required inputs, and validating readiness

 - Help validate field mappings and data flows by organizing customer requirements and coordinating testing steps

 - Escalate and document issues clearly when something isn’t working as expected

Customer Communication & Internal Partnership

 - Provide clear, friendly customer communication about schedules, next steps, and required information

 - Prepare meeting agendas, capture notes, and document configuration decisions and handoff details for Customer Success

 - Partner closely with Implementation Managers, Customer Success, and (when needed) Product/Engineering to keep customers moving forward

 - Contribute to improving internal implementation playbooks, templates, and documentation as the team scales

What We're Looking For

Required

 - Strong organizational and project tracking skills; you enjoy keeping plans and details clean and current

 - Experience at a tech company or other sophisticated work environment (Internship OK)

 - Comfortable working with technical concepts (integrations, data mapping, workflows) even if you’re not the person building everything

 - Excellent written and verbal communication; you can keep customers informed without creating confusion

 - Able to manage multiple projects at once with competing priorities

 - Comfortable working in a fast-moving, early-stage environment where processes are still being built

 - A genuine passion for helping customers achieve success

Nice to Have

 - 1+ years of experience in customer operations, implementation

notes: AI-native hiring software with recent $25M Series B funding
